name: Avocado Filling:
recipeIngredient: 1 small white onion, peeled and finely chopped
3 small serrano chiles or 1 small jalapeno chili, finely chopped
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the avocados with a fork and stir in the onions, cilantro, chiles, and lime juice.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Yield: about 2 1/2 cups
